3d_model.notes: Massing model produced: single-story linear bar anchored to coastal scrub-to-sand threshold. Primary volume oriented along the east-west horizon axis. Covered terrace extends the living bar toward the Pacific. Pool deck volume offset to southwest for solar gain and wind shelter. Terrace-to-pool-deck transition zone clearly articulated as a threshold volume — revised per DG-07 rejection feedback.

renders.notes: Four perspective views: (1) approach from land side — east elevation; (2) covered terrace looking west to horizon showing clear transition to pool deck zone; (3) master suite interior toward Pacific; (4) aerial site overview showing 3,000 sqm site relationship to ocean. Views 2 and 3 revised to clarify terrace-to-pool deck transition per DG-07 revision request.

material_direction.notes: Palette anchored to coastal durability: board-formed concrete (sealed, salt-air resistant) for structural walls; marine-grade stainless steel hardware; teak decking for covered terrace and pool deck; lime wash interior walls in white and warm sand tones. All materials specified for Cerritos, BCS coastal Pacific exposure.

color_direction.notes: Neutral base — raw concrete grey and white lime wash — with warm teak and deep-shadow recesses. Exterior color follows natural site palette: sand, scrub grey-green, bleached coastal rock. No applied color — material expression only. Rationale: horizon as subject; the house recedes.

space_arrangement.notes: All 10 programmed spaces confirmed: Master Suite (45 sqm), 2 Bedrooms (20 sqm each), 3 Bathrooms (8 sqm each), Living/Dining (60 sqm), Kitchen (22 sqm), Studio (18 sqm), Covered Terrace (55 sqm), Pool Deck (45 sqm), Service Areas (20 sqm), Landscape Zone (27 sqm). Linear arrangement: service zone east → bedroom wing → studio → living/dining → covered terrace → pool deck west. Covered terrace and pool deck are distinct volumes separated by a 1.5m threshold step-down zone — revised per DG-07 feedback. 320 sqm total programmed area confirmed. No deviations.

review_notes: Concept package is complete and program-compliant after one revision cycle. All five deliverables confirmed. The horizon-axis orientation is fully documented per Phase 1 scope requirements — the linear bar disposition, covered terrace extension, and interior view lines all prioritize the Pacific horizon as the primary living condition. The covered terrace and pool deck transition was clarified in the second submission with a defined threshold step-down zone. No deviations from the approved area program; all 10 spaces present at approved sizes. DG-07 approved.
